## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] If commit bodies are present, each line starts with `- `
- [ ] No unintended addon-content reorganization is included
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
- [ ] No local or generated files were added by mistake
